fields.body: SoHo Pittsburgh features a large bar with an extensive selection of tap and bottled beer, cocktails, and wine. We offer prompt and respectful service in a versatile venue for both quick bites and large events (corporate events, birthdays, weddings, reunions).

Sunday – Thursday: 11 AM – 11 PM

Friday & Saturday: 11 AM – 12 AM
